domain: Anasazi kiva — underground ceremonial chamber with vertical air-intake shaft, deflector stone redirecting cold incoming air upward to protect central hearth.
specific_mechanism: Deflector stone between intake shaft and hearth redirects vertical airflow horizontally/upward; prevents extinguishing central fire.
llm_application: KIVA-DEFLECT: context-window with central attention focus + entry-side fresh-token intake + DEFLECTOR layer between intake and central focus. Deflector redirects new-token activations to attention sink position (sequence-start) rather than letting them disrupt the central focus subspace.
novelty_claim: StreamingLLM and SinkTrack use attention sinks at sequence start. KIVA-DEFLECT adds explicit deflector routing of new tokens to sink — but routing-to-sink is implicit in attention sink architecture.
